creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
This question is more appropriate to ask on the mailing lists than on a bug/issue tracker. 

I would suggest freebsd-questions [1] or freebsd-hackers [2], after reading: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/freebsd-questions/

[1] https://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-questions
[2] https://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-hackers
